overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt traversing three distinct biomes: a snowy mountain path, a grassy hillside trail, and a foggy coastal shoreline with a shipwreck. The video demonstrates third-person exploration with smooth camera following through natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail through pine forest

agents.ego_description: Geralt running steadily along the snow-covered mountain path with weapons on his back

entered.detail: Snow-covered mountain slope rising steeply on the left side of the path
Dense evergreen pine trees lining the trail ahead and to the sides
Trodden snow path winding through the mountain terrain with visible footprints

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a winding path through a snowy mountain landscape. Pine trees line the route while snow-covered slopes rise on the left, creating a narrow enclosed trail through the wintry environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with dense shrubs

events.description: abrupt transition from snowy mountain to green grassy hillside environment

agents.ego_description: Geralt running along a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall grass and dense bushes

entered.detail: Narrow winding dirt path cutting through the grassy hillside
Tall green bushes and shrubs flanking the left side of the trail
Tall green bushes and shrubs flanking the right side of the trail
Hazy mountain range visible in the far distance through the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a grassy hillside trail dense with shrubs and bushes. Geralt continues running along the narrow dirt path as the terrain descends gradually, with distant mountains becoming visible through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal shoreline with ocean view

events.description: trail opens up to reveal foggy ocean coastline with rock formations

agents.ego_description: Geralt running along the rocky shore approaching a large wooden shipwreck

entered.detail: Calm foggy sea stretching to the horizon with grey-blue water
Gravel and rocky beach terrain with scattered stones and pebbles
Tall rock formations and sea stacks rising from the water offshore
Large wooden longship with dragon prow beached on the rocky shore

segments.scene_description: The trail opens onto a wide rocky coastline with the ocean stretching into the fog. Geralt runs along the shore approaching a large wooden shipwreck beached on the rocks, with sea stacks visible in the water beyond and driftwood scattered along the beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a changing landscape that transforms from a frozen mountain pass into a foggy coastal shoreline. It begins with a run along a winding path through a snowy mountain landscape, flanked by pine trees and steep, snow-covered slopes. As the terrain descends, the wintry environment shifts into a grassy hillside trail dense with shrubs and bushes, where distant mountains emerge through a hazy atmosphere. The scene then opens from the narrow dirt path onto a wide rocky coastline, with the ocean stretching into a thick fog. Finally, the camera follows the character along the shore past scattered driftwood toward a large wooden shipwreck beached on the rocks.
